Name: AtkParam_Npc
Description: Determines the hitbox and damage parameters for attacks.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Hostile
Fields.Description: The damage animation to apply to the victim of this attack.

Fields.Name: Parry Allowed Duration
Fields.Description: The duration from the start of this attack when it can be parried. In frames.

Fields.Name: Map Hit Type
Fields.Description: Which map do you see around the attack? The set

Fields.Name: Enable Blowback Attack
Fields.Description: Specifies whether the attack can turn into a blowback attack under certain conditions (typically flying).

Fields.Name: Damage: Physical
Fields.Description: The base Physical attack value. Used primarily for NPC attacks.

Fields.Name: Damage: Magic
Fields.Description: The base Magic attack value. Used primarily for NPC attacks.

Fields.Name: Damage: Fire
Fields.Description: The base Fire attack value. Used primarily for NPC attacks.

Fields.Name: Damage: Stamina
Fields.Description: The base stamina attack value.

Fields.Name: Damage: Parry
Fields.Description: The base parry attack value.

Fields.Name: Defense: Parry
Fields.Description: The base parry defense value.

Fields.Name: Damage: Guard Attack
Fields.Description: The base guard attack value. Compared against the guard defense value to determine if the attack will bounce.

Fields.Name: Damage: Guard Defense
Fields.Description: The base guard defense value. Compared against the guard attack value to determine if the attack will bounce.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption Invalidation
Fields.Description: Guard cut rate invalidation ratio (-100 to 100)  Normal at 0 / Completely invalidated at -100 / Doubles the defense effect of the opponent at 100  -50, 100% cut shield becomes 50% cut Become

Fields.Name: Ignore Defender Attack Type
Fields.Description: If ON, the defender's attack type defense can be ignored. Example) Slash attack → Enemy that is strong in slash defense. Normally, slash attacks are difficult to deal damage, but with this attack, the damage is not reduced. The result is a versatile attack that is unaffected by the enemy's attack type defense.

Fields.Name: Damage: Poise
Fields.Description: The base poise attack value.

Fields.Name: Damage: Object Destruction
Fields.Description: The base object destruction value. Applied to the object's HP.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Physical
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the base Physical attack value.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Magic
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the base Magic attack value.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Fire
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the base Fire attack value.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Stamina
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the base stamina attack value.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Parry
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the base parry attack value.

Fields.Name: Defense Correction: Parry
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the base parry defense value.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Guard Attack
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the base guard attack value. Compared against the deflection defense value to determine if the attack will bounce.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Guard Defense
Fields.Description: Player only. The multiplier to the base guard defense value. Compared against the deflection attack value to determine if the attack will bounce.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Poise
Fields.Description: Player only. The multiplier to apply to the base poise attack value.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption Correction: Stamina
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the reduction of stamina damage when guarding. Positive values increase guard stability, negative values decrease it.

Fields.Name: Ignore Guard
Fields.Description: If ON, then this attack ignores the victim's guard and applies the damage animation automatically.

Fields.Name: Disable Guard Drain
Fields.Description: If ON, then this attack will not reduce the victim's stamina as a result of them guarding the attack.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the guard absorption value from the weapon. 0, 1x / 100, 2x / -100, guard multiplier = (guard multiplier / 100) to increase / decrease the parameter to 0. + 1)

Fields.Name: Disable Hit SpEffect
Fields.Description: If ON, then this attack will not apply on-hit SpEffects to the victim.

Fields.Name: Hit Source Type
Fields.Description: The source of the dummy Polygon ID to use for this attack.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Initial Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to place the sphere hitbox, or the tip of the capsule hitbox, for this hit.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Secondary Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to place the sphere hitbox, or the tail of the capsule hitbox, for this hit.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Radius
Fields.Description: Determines the radius of the hitbox (sphere/capsule).

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Hit Type
Fields.Description: The hit collision type for this hit slot.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Priority
Fields.Description: The priority for this hit slot. If there are two or more hits at the same time, the one with the higher priority will be adopted.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: Initial Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to place the sphere hitbox, or the tip of the capsule hitbox, for this hit.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: Secondary Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to place the sphere hitbox, or the tail of the capsule hitbox, for this hit.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: Radius
Fields.Description: Determines the radius of the hitbox (sphere/capsule).

Fields.Name: Hit 1: Hit Type
Fields.Description: The hit collision type for this hit slot.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: Priority
Fields.Description: The priority for this hit slot. If there are two or more hits at the same time, the one with the higher priority will be adopted.

Fields.Name: Hit 2: Initial Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to place the sphere hitbox, or the tip of the capsule hitbox, for this hit.

Fields.Name: Hit 2: Secondary Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to place the sphere hitbox, or the tail of the capsule hitbox, for this hit.

Fields.Name: Hit 2: Radius
Fields.Description: Determines the radius of the hitbox (sphere/capsule).

Fields.Name: Hit 2: Hit Type
Fields.Description: The hit collision type for this hit slot.

Fields.Name: Hit 2: Priority
Fields.Description: The priority for this hit slot. If there are two or more hits at the same time, the one with the higher priority will be adopted.

Fields.Name: Hit 3: Initial Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to place the sphere hitbox, or the tip of the capsule hitbox, for this hit.

Fields.Name: Hit 3: Secondary Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to place the sphere hitbox, or the tail of the capsule hitbox, for this hit.

Fields.Name: Hit 3: Radius
Fields.Description: Determines the radius of the hitbox (sphere/capsule).

Fields.Name: Hit 3: Hit Type
Fields.Description: The hit collision type for this hit slot.

Fields.Name: Hit 3: Priority
Fields.Description: The priority for this hit slot. If there are two or more hits at the same time, the one with the higher priority will be adopted.

Fields.Name: Knockback: Initial Speed
Fields.Description: The initial speed of knockback from this attack. In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Knockback: Initial Speed Duration
Fields.Description: The duration of the initial speed for knockback, before it decays. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Knockback: Speed Decay
Fields.Description: The duration for the knockback to decay from initial speed to zero. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Ignore Knockback Absorption
Fields.Description: If ON, this attack ignores knockback absorption on the defender's side.

Fields.Name: Disable Missed Attack Notification
Fields.Description: If ON, then the enemy AI is not given notification of a missed attack.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 0
Fields.Description: SpEffect ID applied to victim by this attack.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 1
Fields.Description: SpEffect ID applied to victim by this attack.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 2
Fields.Description: SpEffect ID applied to victim by this attack.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 3
Fields.Description: SpEffect ID applied to victim by this attack.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 4
Fields.Description: SpEffect ID applied to victim by this attack.
